name: Princess Lysandra Aurelia D’Elyssar
description: Raised in opulence, Lysandra has always been the center of attention and is accustomed to bending the world to her will. However, the influence of the High Church over her father, the king, has led to restrictions on her freedom and attempts to mold her into a compliant ruler. Resentful and determined, she seeks forbidden magic as a tool to reclaim control of her life and exact revenge on those who would see her subdued.
